arts.ttl: Belgium v Wales: World Cup 2026 qualifier – live
arts.sum: Updates from the Group J match; kick-off 7.45pm BST Email Michael | Live scores | Tables | Read Football Daily Joe Morrell, currently without a club, aged 28 and who played for Wales at the last World Cup, isn’t featuring tonight. But this was still an excellent interview last week with the Welsh midfielder. One potential mis-match for Wales is at left back. Ben Davies is about as dependable as they come but should the lightning quick Jérémy Doku drift out to Belgium’s right wing, he might be able to breeze straight past the veteran defender, who is more accustomed to playing centre back these days. I wouldn’t be surprised to see Doku and Leandro Trossard swap wings for Belgium as the game goes on. Continue reading...
